lede: A look at August 16 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Jannik Sinner and Nikos Zisis, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: August Complex fire
events.desc: The August Complex fire in California burns more than one million acres of land.

events.title: Northwest Airlines Flight 255
events.desc: Northwest Airlines Flight 255, a McDonnell Douglas MD-82, crashes after takeoff in Detroit, Michigan, killing 154 of the 155 on board, plus two people on the ground.

events.title: Direct Action Day
events.desc: Mass riots in Kolkata begin; more than 4,000 people would be killed in 72 hours.

events.title: National Assembly of Vietnam
events.desc: The National Representatives' Congress, the precursor of the current National Assembly of Vietnam, convenes in Sơn Dương.

events.title: Ray Chapman
events.desc: Ray Chapman of the Cleveland Indians is hit on the head by a fastball thrown by Carl Mays of the New York Yankees. Next day, Chapman will become the second player to die from injuries sustained in a Major League Baseball game.

events.title: Communist Party of Bukhara
events.desc: The congress of the Communist Party of Bukhara opens. The congress would call for armed revolution.

events.title: San Sebastian Church (Manila)
events.desc: The Basilica of San Sebastian, Manila, the first all-steel church in Asia, is officially inaugurated and blessed.

events.title: Franco-Prussian War
events.desc: Franco-Prussian War: The Battle of Mars-la-Tour is fought, resulting in a Prussian victory.

events.title: French Revolution
events.desc: French Revolution: A levée en masse is decreed by the National Convention.

events.title: American Revolutionary War
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: The Americans led by General John Stark rout British and Brunswick troops under Friedrich Baum at the Battle of Bennington in Walloomsac, New York.

births.name: Leslie Manigat
births.line: Haitian educator and politician, 43rd President of Haiti (died 2014)

deaths.text: Sultan Ahmad Nanupuri, Bangladeshi Islamic scholar and teacher
Lydia Field Emmet, American painter and academic
Charles François de Broglie, Marquis of Ruffec, marquis de Ruffec, French soldier and diplomat

observances.text: Christian feast day: Ana Petra Pérez Florido
Christian feast day: Stephen I of Hungary
Christian feast day: Translation of the Acheiropoietos icon from Edessa to Constantinople. (Eastern Orthodox Church)
